case_title: GIOVANNI P. PONCE VS. GILL BALBER SINGH et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED NOV-04-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SINGH, GILL BALBER

DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT GILL BALBER SINGH NOT PRESENT. CO-DEFENDANT DARIO RIVAS PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2008 - CONTINUED TO JAN-12-2009 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THIS CASE REMAINS ON CALENDAR JANUARY 12, 2009 AT 5:30 PM PENDING PLAINTIFF'S APPEARANCE IN TRAFFIC COURT. PLAINTIFF SHALL GO IMMEDIATELY TO THE TRAFFIC DIVISION OF THIS COURT, LOCATED AT 850 BRYANT STREET, ROOM 145 TO SCHEDULE A HEARING ON HIS CITATION # 006292952. AT THE TRAFFIC HEARING, PLAINTIFF MAY REQUEST A DISMISSAL OF HIS FAILURE TO APPEAR, AND PRESENT PROOF OF INSURANCE AND FRONT PLATE ON DEFENDANT'S VEHICLE. PLAINTIFF MUST MAKE HIS COURT APPEARANCE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. COMMISSIONER PAUL SALVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-12-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR- DUPILCATE OF CASE ON CALENDAR.
